hyperedges.label: Offer-to-Order Conversion Flow
hyperedges.description: A Customer (via ContactPerson) receives an Offer from a Supplier, managed by a User; the Offer is then converted to an Order sharing the same Supplier/Customer/ContactPerson/User references

hyperedges.label: Async Document Generation Pipeline
hyperedges.description: Tasks orchestrate document lifecycle: a Task (with status/target/type) drives a Document through statuses from PENDING to UPLOADED; targets determine if it's for an Offer or Order

hyperedges.label: Tariff-Based Pricing Structure
hyperedges.description: Tariffs define pricing via TariffConfigs (Contract+duration+quantity+price); Products belong to Tariffs; TariffCustomers allow per-customer overrides of the same structure

nodes.label: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Agent configuration with graphify knowledge graph rules for codebase navigation

nodes.label: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Claude agent config with graphify rules and Prisma migration commands

nodes.label: client/README.md
nodes.summary: React + TypeScript + Vite template setup with React Compiler and ESLint config

nodes.label: client/index.html
nodes.summary: Main HTML entry point for Vite React client, loads main.tsx and DM Sans/Mono fonts

nodes.label: client/template.html
nodes.summary: pdf2htmlEX-generated HTML template for rendering PDF documents as interactive pages

nodes.label: server/prisma/schema/openapi/openapi.yaml
nodes.summary: OpenAPI 3.1.0 schema defining Prisma data model: customers, offers, orders, products, tariffs, documents, tasks

nodes.label: client/public/favicon.svg
nodes.summary: Lightning bolt favicon icon in purple (#863bff) with glow effects, brand identity for the app

nodes.label: client/public/icons.svg
nodes.summary: SVG sprite sheet containing social/link icons: bluesky, discord, documentation, github, social, x-twitter

nodes.label: Knowledge Graph (graphify)
nodes.rationale: graphify is used as primary codebase navigation tool; agents must consult graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md before reading source files; graph query commands preferred over grep for cross-module questions; graph must be updated after code changes via 'graphify update .'

nodes.label: Prisma ORM
nodes.rationale: Prisma is used for database schema management; migrations via 'npx prisma migrate dev'; schema push via 'npx prisma db push'; must run 'npx prisma generate' after migrating or pushing

nodes.label: pdf2htmlEX
nodes.rationale: Used to convert generated PDFs into interactive HTML for client-side viewing; provides sidebar navigation, page rescaling, lazy page loading, and link handling

nodes.label: Offer-to-Order Workflow
nodes.rationale: Business flow where an Offer (quote) is created for a Customer, then converted to an Order; both share Supplier, Customer, ContactPerson, and User references; Offer tracks revisions and reservation status; Order references the originating Offer

nodes.label: Document Generation Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Async pipeline for generating offer/order PDFs: Task tracks status (PENDING->RUNNING->COMPLETED/FAILED), targets (OFFER/ORDER/RENEWAL), and types (GENERATION/UPLOAD/RESERVATION); Document tracks format (PDF/DOCX/RESERVED) and status (PENDING->PROCESSING->GENERATED->UPLOADING->UPLOADED/FAILED)

nodes.label: Tariff Pricing Model
nodes.rationale: Pricing is structured through Tariffs containing TariffConfigs; each config binds a Contract type with duration, min/max quantity, and price; TariffCustomer allows customer-specific pricing overrides; Products belong to a Tariff

nodes.label: Customer
nodes.summary: Core business entity with customerId, companyName, address, phone; has many ContactPersons, Offers, Orders, Users, TariffCustomers

nodes.label: ContactPerson
nodes.summary: Contact person belonging to a Customer; has salutation, firstName, lastName, email; linked to Offers and Orders

nodes.label: Offer
nodes.summary: Business offer/quote with Supplier, Customer, ContactPerson, User, Language; has OfferPositions, OfferFlatRates, OfferDocuments, OfferRevisions; can be reserved; tracks version and net_amount

nodes.label: OfferRevision
nodes.summary: Version snapshot of an Offer; stores version number, snapshot object, and changedBy

nodes.label: OfferPosition
nodes.summary: Line item in an Offer; references Product and Contract; has duration_months, quantity, optional flag, total_cents

nodes.label: OfferFlatRate
nodes.summary: Flat rate line item in an Offer; references FlatRate; has quantity and total_cents

nodes.label: OfferDocument
nodes.summary: Document version attached to an Offer; tracks version number and isCurrent flag

nodes.label: Order
nodes.summary: Business order derived from an Offer; has Supplier, Customer, ContactPerson, Employee(User), Offer reference; has OrderPositions, OrderFlatRates, OrderDocuments

nodes.label: OrderPosition
nodes.summary: Line item in an Order; mirrors OfferPosition with Product, Contract, duration_months, quantity, optional, total_cents

nodes.label: OrderFlatRate
nodes.summary: Flat rate line item in an Order; mirrors OfferFlatRate with FlatRate, quantity, total_cents

nodes.label: OrderDocument
nodes.summary: Document version attached to an Order; mirrors OfferDocument with version, isCurrent

nodes.label: Product
nodes.summary: Product entity with key, translations, belongs to a Tariff; referenced in OfferPositions, OrderPositions, TariffCustomers

nodes.label: ProductTranslation
nodes.summary: Localized product name, description, table; keyed by Language

nodes.label: Tariff
nodes.summary: Pricing tariff containing Products, TariffConfigs, and TariffCustomers

nodes.label: TariffConfig
nodes.summary: Pricing rule within a Tariff; binds Contract with duration, min/max_quantity, price

nodes.label: TariffCustomer
nodes.summary: Customer-specific tariff override; binds Tariff, Product, Contract, Customer with duration, min/max_quantity, price

nodes.label: User
nodes.summary: Application user with auth (sessions, accounts), profile info, role, ban status; can belong to a Customer; creates Offers and Orders

nodes.label: Session
nodes.summary: User session with token, expiry, IP address, user agent

nodes.label: Account
nodes.summary: OAuth account for a User with providerId, accountId, tokens

nodes.label: Supplier
nodes.summary: Supplier entity with supplierId, name; linked to Offers and Orders

nodes.label: FlatRate
nodes.summary: Flat rate pricing entity with key, total_cents, translations; used in OfferFlatRates and OrderFlatRates

nodes.label: FlatRateTranslation
nodes.summary: Localized flat rate name and table; keyed by Language

nodes.label: Contract
nodes.summary: Contract type with key, translations; referenced in OfferPositions, OrderPositions, TariffConfigs, TariffCustomers

nodes.label: ContractTranslation
nodes.summary: Localized contract name, features list, table; keyed by Language

nodes.label: Document
nodes.summary: Generated document with displayName, format (PDF/DOCX/RESERVED), status, path; linked to Task, OfferDocument, OrderDocument

nodes.label: Task
nodes.summary: Async task tracking document generation/upload/reservation; has status, target (OFFER/ORDER/RENEWAL), type (UPLOAD/RESERVATION/GENERATION)

nodes.label: Verification
nodes.summary: Verification token with identifier, value, expiry

nodes.label: DocumentStatus
nodes.summary: Enum: PENDING, PROCESSING, GENERATED, UPLOADING, UPLOADED, FAILED

nodes.label: DocumentFormat
nodes.summary: Enum: PDF, DOCX, RESERVED

nodes.label: TaskStatus
nodes.summary: Enum: COMPLETED, RUNNING, PENDING, FAILED

nodes.label: TaskTarget
nodes.summary: Enum: OFFER, ORDER, RENEWAL

nodes.label: TaskType
nodes.summary: Enum: UPLOAD, RESERVATION, GENERATION

nodes.label: Language
nodes.summary: Enum: DE, EN — supports German and English localization

hyperedges.label: Offer-to-Order Conversion Flow
hyperedges.description: A Customer (via ContactPerson) receives an Offer from a Supplier, managed by a User; the Offer is then converted to an Order sharing the same Supplier/Customer/ContactPerson/User references

hyperedges.label: Async Document Generation Pipeline
hyperedges.description: Tasks orchestrate document lifecycle: a Task (with status/target/type) drives a Document through statuses from PENDING to UPLOADED; targets determine if it's for an Offer or Order

hyperedges.label: Tariff-Based Pricing Structure
hyperedges.description: Tariffs define pricing via TariffConfigs (Contract+duration+quantity+price); Products belong to Tariffs; TariffCustomers allow per-customer overrides of the same structure
